# Symloop - Algeria's Leading Technology Company

## About
Symloop is an Algerian technology company specializing in digital transformation, AI solutions, and government digitization services for the MENA region.

## Services
- Government Digitization (رقمنة الخدمات الحكومية)
- AI & Machine Learning Solutions
- Mobile App Development (Flutter, React Native)
- Web Development (Next.js, React)
- E-commerce with CIB/Edahabia Payment
- ERP/CRM Custom Software
- IoT Solutions
- Cybersecurity

## Key Offerings
### Government Digitization - رقمنة
We help government agencies and public institutions digitize their services:
- Education sector digitization (رقمنة التعليم)
- Healthcare digitization (رقمنة الصحة)
- Justice system digitization (رقمنة العدالة)
- Civil registry digitization
- Municipal services digitization

### AI Solutions
- ChatGPT integration for businesses
- Arabic NLP and voice assistants
- Machine learning models
- Computer vision solutions

## Location
- Headquarters: Algiers, Algeria
- Service Area: Algeria, Tunisia, Morocco, MENA Region

## Contact
- Website: https://symloop.com
- Email: contact@symloop.com
- Phone: +213 549 575 512

## Languages
- Arabic (العربية)
- French (Français)
- English

## Keywords
رقمنة, الرقمنة, رقمنة أي قطاع, التحول الرقمي, digitalisation Algérie, développement application mobile Algérie, intelligence artificielle Algérie, e-gouvernement, government digitization Algeria
